extraction.one_line_summary: BONIFAZIO Niccolò won from a reduced peloton after TRATNIK Jan was caught inside final 300m following 5+ hour breakaway.
tactical_patterns: TRATNIK survived solo 60km+ after breakaway split, caught inside 300m—breakaway persistence threshold extends far on hard stages.
TURGIS collected KOM points from breakaway despite no GC threat, allowing TOTAL DIRECT ENERGIE to defend jersey without team effort.
GILBERT and ARNDT paced final chase after DENZ cracked, revealing GC domestiques prioritized over sprint leadout on hardest stages.
EWAN mechanically out on longest stage after earlier crash, confirming sprinters with accumulated damage exit race before final mountain days.

rider_signals.TRATNIK Jan: positive: survived solo 60+km after breakaway fracture, nearly held off peloton after 227km stage
rider_signals.BONIFAZIO Niccolò: positive: won from reduced bunch sprint after 227km hard stage, suggesting genuine all-rounder capacity
rider_signals.GARCÍA CORTINA Iván: neutral: led out teammate BONIFAZIO effectively but faded final 50m, domestique role confirmed
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: mechanical in finale after stage 3 crash, accumulating race damage eliminating him before mountains
rider_signals.DENZ Nico: negative: dropped while pacing peloton before finale, insufficient form to sustain GC chase tempo
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: negative: abandoned after descent crash pointing to pelvis, DNF before mountain stages
rider_signals.MULLEN Ryan: neutral: survived longest breakaway adventure but contributed nothing to finale, time trial specialist misused
rider_signals.GOUGEARD Alexis: neutral: animated breakaway all day but caught with TRATNIK in finale
rider_signals.TURGIS Anthony: positive: collected KOM points from breakaway despite team having jersey, opportunistic tactical execution
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: neutral: retained yellow with team defending conservatively, BORA prioritizing GC over stage hunting
